returns._0: The address of the EVC contract.

acceptOwnership().details: The new owner accepts the ownership transfer.

params._evc: The address of the EVC contract.
params._owner: The owner of the factory contract.
params._permit2: The address of the Permit2 contract.
params._perspective: The address of the supported perspective contract.

params.asset: The address of the underlying asset.
params.initialTimelock: The initial timelock of the vault.
params.name: The name of the vault.
params.salt: The salt to use for the AmpleEarn vault's CREATE2 address.

returns._0: The length of the proxy list array

returns.list: An array containing the slice of the proxy list

isStrategyAllowed(address).details: Warning: Only allow trusted, correctly implemented ERC4626 strategies to be used by the Earn vault.Warning: Allowed strategies must not be prone to the first-depositor attack.Warning: To prevent exchange rate manipulation, it is recommended that the allowed strategies are not empty or have sufficient protection.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

pendingOwner().details: Returns the address of the pending owner.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

params._perspective: The address of the new perspective contract.

transferOwnership(address).details: Starts the ownership transfer of the contract to a new account. Replaces the pending transfer if there is one. Can only be called by the current owner. Setting `newOwner` to the zero address is allowed; this can be used to cancel an initiated ownership transfer.

EVC().notice: Returns the address of the Ethereum Vault Connector (EVC) used by this contract.

getVaultListLength().notice: Fetch the length of the deployed proxies list

getVaultListSlice(uint256,uint256).notice: Get a slice of the deployed proxies array

isStrategyAllowed(address).notice: Whether a strategy is allowed to be used by the Earn vault.

isVault(address).notice: Whether a vault was created with the factory.

permit2Address().notice: The address of the Permit2 contract.

supportedPerspective().notice: The address of the supported perspective contract.
